message:
test(fcp-core): add comprehensive Policy Engine golden vector tests

Add 34 tests covering:
- Revocation staleness (RevocationStaleFrontier)
- Transport mode enforcement (LAN, DERP, Funnel forbidden/allowed)
- Zone policy lists (principal/connector/capability deny/allow)
- Capability ceiling enforcement
- Pattern matching (exact, wildcard prefix/suffix, multiple patterns)
- Deny list precedence over allow list
- Sanitizer receipt coverage validation
- Execution approval requirements
- Approval token expiration
- Role graph cycle detection and unknown role handling
- DecisionReasonCode string format validation

Includes CBOR golden vectors for all decision scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
